body:
Compare this Android app (Claude-Email-App) against the claude-email backend service at /home/cocodedk/0-projects/claude-email.

Goal: determine whether the app lives up to / implements the full capabilities exposed by claude-email.

Steps:
1. Read /home/cocodedk/0-projects/claude-email/README.md, CLAUDE.md, docs/, chat_server.py, and the MCP tool definitions (chat_enqueue_task, chat_cancel_task, chat_queue_status, chat_where_am_i, chat_reset_project, chat_confirm_reset, chat_commit_project, and any agent/register/notify tools) to enumerate what claude-email offers end-to-end (email routing, task queue, branch strategy, resets, commit escape hatch, cross-project dashboard, agent features).
2. Inventory this Android app: UI screens, API/MCP client code, features, gaps, TODOs.
3. Produce a gap analysis table: backend feature -> app support (full / partial / missing) with short notes and file references.
4. Call out anything the app does that the backend doesn't need, and anything the backend offers that the app doesn't surface.
5. Write the findings to docs/gap-analysis-vs-claude-email.md in this repo and summarize the top 5 gaps in the final reply.

Do not modify source code — analysis + one markdown doc only.
